review_title: Ayhan's Comment for Keepit at AH@06092022_1540
description: This Keepit idea is perfect! Everything works fine!
author: Ayhan H.
pros: This Keepit idea is perfect! Everything works fine!
cons: I thing the Mobile Applications can be easy to use?

review_title: Great service of Cloud-to-Cloud backup for M365 and many more
description: We are managing our backup of Exchange Online, Teams, Sharepoint, OneDrive for Business and Entra ID with keepit. For us, Keepit is an integral part of our business continuity plan.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: A fully managed backup service for Exchange Online and MS-Teams was the most important functionality for us. Integration with Azure AD (now Entry ID) and a backup for Entra ID was a great addition to the must-haves. We like the great usability of the web UI and the storage of the data outside of Azure datacenters (we need a solution where it's possible to get the data even if the Microsoft infrastructure is 100% down).
cons: The dashboard could be a bit faster. I think that's the only thing I don't like.

description: It was great now its just decent.
author: Michael D.
pros: Being able to easily share dokuments by rightclicking and choosing "share with keepit" and the content of the shared folder was originally dynamic.
cons: To many technical problems with installing and faulty softwareupdates. But worst of all to many updates that was supposed to make KeepIT an overall better product but in fact it just made the customer experience for us at least worse... It became less userfriendly for our teachers to use and to expensive a product.

review_title: Easiest and fastest way to a reliable O365 and AAD backup
description: "easy peasy" sounds funnny, but I would like more of keepIT's kind of vendor and easy of use product in the IT enviroment. Would make CIO's live much easier!
author: Peter G.
pros: Easy to: - Install - Maintain - Restore - adopt to specific backup needs - have separate admins with different funcionalities
cons: As usual the price, but to be honest it's worth every cent!

review_title: strong and cevil points of keepit
description: I have a copy of onedrive and email of many of my users protecting critical information of the company, when we fire someone, we can be sure that critical information for us is not destroyed.
author: José David L.
pros: I really like having different copies over time of my emails anonymously by the user, it's an extra security.
cons: His method of searching for information in one drive and in the mail leaves much to be desired, we need a lot of time to search for the information we need. It becomes very difficult to find information among all the documents of a certain user.

review_title: 3rd party backup to ensure you have your data in more than one Cloud
author: Lasse T.
pros: The software keeps improving, covering all the aspects of Office 365, Azure and Dynamics 365 that we need to back up for a very long time (in our case 33 years). Having a secure and independent cloud for all our Microsoft data is of great value to us if the worst should happen.
cons: Over the years Keepit has covered all my suggestions for improvement. I would like them to be fully ISO 27001 certified, but they are working on it!

review_title: A good and easy to use cloud solution
description: Keepit Gives me peace of mind to know that there is a good backup in a protected place
author: Erez A.
pros: It's very easy to implement and use. Has all the features I need for mail backup
cons: The price is a little bit high compared to other solutions

description: This is a very reliable service, gives you good sleep knowing all 365 things are backed up on a secondary place
author: Fredrik N.
pros: Ease of use and implementation, its a startup and forgett deployment, it just works
cons: I cant really think of any drawbacks. Its so easy to use and deploy and then you can relax.

description: Great service and can see a clear path of what they are trying to achieve with this product, looking forward to more updates coming out.
author: James G.
pros: Easy to use and setup we had it up and running within a couple of hours and also have restored data quickly too
cons: We would like better search functionality to be able to easily find emails or data to restore

author: Christian B.
pros: Easy implemented full backup of our Microsoft Office 365 environment. Adding of new featues without increasing the costs.
cons: The integration of SSO was a little bit tricky when we implement Keepit, two years ago.

author: Marc S.
pros: Good price for unlimited storage. Good support.
cons: none

author: Jesper C.
pros: Its been running automatically for 1 year now without any problems
cons: Cannot find where to setup so I can get a mail each day with status of the backup

author: Andrej T.
pros: Simple integration, very simple web interface and restoration process.
cons: From global point of view, everything is OK.

author: michael T.
pros: it's easy to use and you can fast learn how to use it
cons: that you not can get an mail the backup is complet

author: jIm R.
pros: Simple for administration, easy set up and educate a regular user do be an admin
cons: all good for now, we will see when we used it for a while
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Does what it says on the tin
description: Keepit does what it says and is ideal for a backup system that doesn't need too much input to achive whats expected of it
author: Ray G.
pros: The Ability to restore both induvial files and entire Sharepoint groups at the click of the button
cons: The fixed nature of snapshots taken some degree of control would be desirable

author: Martina M.
pros: Finally we found a software that help us preventing data mail loss.
cons: Not great personalization. but at least it does the work
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Andre G.
pros: To have the security to always be able to recover any email or other Microsoft communication channel and to have an automatic backup of employees who have been offboarded.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Samuel O.
pros: The software is easy to use and the implementation is fast.
cons: I didn´t like the visualization of emails.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Easy to setup, easy to use.
author: John L.
pros: Once it's set up, it just runs. No hastle, no tweaking, it just works.
cons: I'm missing the option to download a pst file from the archived mails.

description: Nice customer service from sales to implementation and ongoing support
author: Juan C.
pros: Easy connection to M365 and simple recovery options
cons: Search functionality is very limited with search string restrictions and poor filter options for results.

review_title: reliable backup and restore from backups
author: claus P.
pros: it was easy to setup 365 integration and it is running with no problems
cons: i have not found at the moment anything i dont like with the product

review_title: Keepit for Email, Office and SharePoint
author: Edward F.
pros: Very easy to use and reliable. Was quick to implement.
cons: Admin web page get stuck sometimes. Many improvements were made.

description: So far so good. Good support, Good guides. Backup recovery done, and was pleased.
author: Delin H.
pros: The product is easy to use, as most of the setup are wizard - like configuration. Even then should there be any queries the support was there to assist. Guides are also readily available, and easy to understand.
cons: So far not much issue. Zendesk is a bit more challenging to setup, but still working on it.

review_title: Secure and easy backup and recovery
description: We are very satisfied with the product knowing that our data is safe, ans the few times we've needed support it was delivered almost at once and to our full satisfaction.
author: Carsten A.
pros: The setup was very easy, and it just works. Luckily we haven't had any major need for backup, but in the few cases where we did need to recover data it was rather easy. I really like the feature where you can give a user a link to all (or just some) their backup data.
cons: It would always be better if the cost was lower.
